score_evidence.completeness: All 10 programmed spaces from seed data present with name, qty, and size_sqm: Sala Lectura Adultos (400m²), Sala Lectura Infantil (200m²), Acervo Cerrado (300m²), Sala Cómputo (150m²), Sala Usos Múltiples (200m²), Administración (150m²), Sanitarios (4×30m²=120m²), Vestíbulo (200m²), Estacionamiento (250m²), Bodega (30m²). Solar noted as engineering scope. Civic art space integrated (not a separate room — documented assumption). Score 5.
score_evidence.accuracy: Total verification: 400+200+300+150+200+150+120+200+250+30 = 2,000m². Exactly matches seed data program. Sanitarios correctly calculated: 4 units × 30m² = 120m². No arithmetic error. Score 5.
score_evidence.clarity: Matrix readable as standalone document: each entry has name, qty, size_sqm, and notes describing function and requirements. No context needed. Score 5.
score_evidence.state_sync: Score 3 (simulated run — ASANA_UNAVAILABLE). State update to area_program_confirmed not confirmed in live Asana.
score_evidence.timing: Area program produced in Segment C, before any scope or cost downstream work. Exists before DG-03 Marcela review. Score 5.
score_evidence.decision_readiness: Assumptions section fully documented: 7 explicit assumptions including circulation/walls rationale, solar scope placement, civic art space integration rationale, landscape default rule, construction cost benchmark. Marcela can review with full context. Score 5.

decision_commentary: Exemplary area program. All 10 seed data spaces present at exact specified sizes. Total 2,000m² verified. Assumptions section is comprehensive (7 items). Special features (solar, civic art, accessibility) all addressed with clear scope notes. Only deduction is simulated Asana state sync.
